title: Slate configuration
description: Optional declarative white-labeling for the Slate viewer. All fields are optional; the same shape may be embedded as the 'config' header of a v2 manifest.

projectName.description: Header logo text and document-title suffix. Defaults to the root README H1.

logo.description: Path or URL to a logo image. Falls back to a generated monogram.

brandColor.description: Hex color that drives the --color-brand-* token family.

defaultTheme.description: Initial theme before any user override. 'auto' follows prefers-color-scheme.

density.description: Sets the [data-density] attribute, scaling the spacing tokens.

landing.description: Content path opened at the root route and on logo click. Defaults to README.md.

contentRoot.description: Optional base path prepended to manifest, page, and asset fetches only. Hash routes remain the raw path. Defaults to empty (shell colocated with content).
